theme_notes: Taglines riff on Trump's Iran deal ('84-day war, largely negotiated'), the Champions League final (PSG vs Arsenal in Budapest), Trump tariffs struck down by courts ($1,500/household, Costco filing refunds), the WHO declaring Ebola in DRC/Uganda a global emergency, the White House checkpoint shooting, and the Indianapolis 500 running today.
settled: Cleaner than the Iran deal. And the Iran deal isn't signed yet.
Even the tariff courts would call this one resolved. Briefly enjoy it.
Zero balance. Not even Indy 500 pit crews work this efficiently.
youOwe: Less than a Champions League program in Budapest. Still humiliating.
The tariff on your dignity costs more than this.
Even Indy 500 cars finish the race. Be like the cars.
Trump brokered an Iran ceasefire faster than you filed a Venmo.
Ebola got a WHO emergency response faster than you got a payment notification.
Cannes popcorn or paying this back. You chose the void.
Arsenal flew to Budapest to win. You cannot wire three hundred dollars.
More than the average tariff refund. Which you also didn't file.
The White House upgraded its checkpoint. You haven't paid your share.
Courts struck down the tariffs. Your debt has no appellate options.
Newsom declared a state of emergency for less. He knows about you.
PSG's Budapest minibar tab. You are, objectively, worse than PSG.
US households owe $1,500 in tariffs on average. You're lapping them.
The Strait of Hormuz reopened. Your wallet remains sealed shut.
WHO would classify this as a Public Health Emergency of International Concern.
Costco filed a tariff refund. File one for this relationship.
The Senate voted 50–47 to halt the Iran war. Nothing halts what you owe.
84 days of war cost less goodwill than this. Historians have noted it.
theyOwe: They owe you one Cannes-adjacent espresso. Still yours. Collect.
A tariff rounding error. Legally owed.
One Indy 500 hot dog, lukewarm, pit-lane adjacent. Outstanding.
Less than a scalped Champions League seat in the bad section. Still owed.
The Iran ceasefire moved faster than their Venmo.
You paid. They didn't. This is how 84-day wars start.
WHO declared a global emergency for less. You are being too calm.
Arsenal got to Budapest. They can't get to the payment app.
More than the average tariff refund. They owe it regardless.
Orange County is in a state of emergency. So are your finances.
The Iran deal is 'largely negotiated.' This debt is largely not.
A tariff court battle would be cheaper. And more dignified.
The Secret Service acted faster than they ever will.
The White House survived a gunman quicker than you'll survive this.
The Ebola Emergency Fund called. It wanted your advice on containment.
PSG's Budapest hotel bill. You paid both rooms. You weren't invited.
The US Senate invoked the War Powers Act for less conflict than this.
You've closed the Strait of Hormuz. International shipping is affected.
